nodes.name: file:.agents/skills/impeccable/SKILL.md
observations: Skill definition file for the impeccable UI design skill
Contains instructions for UI design critique, redesign, and polishing
Entry point for the impeccable skill system
References agent files and scripts in the impeccable directory

nodes.name: file:.agents/skills/impeccable/scripts/critique-storage.mjs
observations: Critique persistence helper for the impeccable skill
242 lines, JavaScript/ES module
Imports: fs (node:fs), path (node:path), fileURLToPath/pathToFileURL (node:url), getCritiqueDir (./impeccable-paths.mjs)
Exports: slugFromTarget, nowFilenameStamp, writeSnapshot, readLatestSnapshot, readTrend
Writes per-target snapshot files to .impeccable/critique/<timestamp>__<slug>.md
CLI entry points: slug, write, latest, trend subcommands
Slug derived mechanically from resolved artifact path or URL

nodes.name: function:.agents/skills/impeccable/scripts/critique-storage.mjs:slugFromTarget
observations: Line 43-68, exported
Derives a stable slug from a resolved target (file path or URL)
Params: resolved, cwd
Calls: process.cwd, path.isAbsolute, path.resolve, path.relative, path.basename, kebab

nodes.name: function:.agents/skills/impeccable/scripts/critique-storage.mjs:kebab
observations: Line 70-81, private
Converts string to kebab-case slug, capped at 50 chars
Params: s

nodes.name: function:.agents/skills/impeccable/scripts/critique-storage.mjs:nowFilenameStamp
observations: Line 87-90, exported
Generates filename-safe UTC ISO timestamp
Params: date

nodes.name: function:.agents/skills/impeccable/scripts/critique-storage.mjs:writeSnapshot
observations: Line 99-112, exported
Writes a snapshot file for a slug with frontmatter and body
Calls: getCritiqueDir, fs.mkdirSync, nowFilenameStamp, path.join, serializeFrontmatter, fs.writeFileSync

nodes.name: function:.agents/skills/impeccable/scripts/critique-storage.mjs:serializeFrontmatter
observations: Line 114-125, private
Serializes an object to YAML-like frontmatter string
Quotes strings containing : or # characters

nodes.name: function:.agents/skills/impeccable/scripts/critique-storage.mjs:parseFrontmatter
observations: Line 127-144, private
Parses YAML-like frontmatter from text
Handles quoted strings, numbers

nodes.name: function:.agents/skills/impeccable/scripts/critique-storage.mjs:listSnapshotsForSlug
observations: Line 149-157, private
Lists all snapshot files for a slug, sorted oldest to newest
Calls: getCritiqueDir, fs.existsSync, fs.readdirSync, path.join

nodes.name: function:.agents/skills/impeccable/scripts/critique-storage.mjs:readLatestSnapshot
observations: Line 163-169, exported
Returns the most recent snapshot for a slug, or null
Calls: listSnapshotsForSlug, fs.readFileSync, parseFrontmatter

nodes.name: function:.agents/skills/impeccable/scripts/critique-storage.mjs:readTrend
observations: Line 175-179, exported
Returns last N snapshots' frontmatter for trend display
Calls: listSnapshotsForSlug, parseFrontmatter, fs.readFileSync

nodes.name: function:.agents/skills/impeccable/scripts/critique-storage.mjs:main
observations: Line 183-223, private
CLI entry point dispatching to slug/write/latest/trend subcommands
Parses process.argv for command and arguments

observations: Line 225-234, private
